## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Call tool `...` with input `...`
2. See error / unexpected output

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full tool output or error message.

  "connections": {}
}
